channel.title: littlericenoodles TikTok
channel.description: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from littlericenoodles

item.title: Malaysian Hokkien Mee Hokkien Mee is a popular stir-fried noodle dish in Malaysia, it's a staple of Kuala Lumpur street food culture. Known for its thick yellow noodles, rich dark soy sauce, and smoky wok hei flavor. Typically cooked with pork, squid, shr
item.description: Malaysian Hokkien Mee Hokkien Mee is a popular stir-fried noodle dish in Malaysia, it's a staple of Kuala Lumpur street food culture. Known for its thick yellow noodles, rich dark soy sauce, and smoky wok hei flavor. Typically cooked with pork, squid, shr

item.title: NO COOKING COLD SPICY TOFU this is inspired by the Korean Chinese-style “Hot Tofu” (烫豆腐）, a home dish popular among the Korean ethnic minority in Northeast China. This recipe requires no cooking, simply mix all the ingredients for the sauce, open a packet
item.description: NO COOKING COLD SPICY TOFU this is inspired by the Korean Chinese-style “Hot Tofu” (烫豆腐）, a home dish popular among the Korean ethnic minority in Northeast China. This recipe requires no cooking, simply mix all the ingredients for the sauce, open a packet

item.title: Lemongrass iced tea This was one of our favourite drink in Thailand, it is so refreshing and with a Southeast Asian twist, the perfect summer drink😌 It has normally a lighter colour because not so much tea is put inside, but I can the tea to be stronger a
item.description: Lemongrass iced tea This was one of our favourite drink in Thailand, it is so refreshing and with a Southeast Asian twist, the perfect summer drink😌 It has normally a lighter colour because not so much tea is put inside, but I can the tea to be stronger a

item.title: Caterpillar 🐛 meter beans A great summer dish that requires very little cooking - we made these caterpillar meter beans, it was so crunchy and refreshing, meter beans have the name because they can grow up to one meter long and are used widely in Chinese
item.description: Caterpillar 🐛 meter beans A great summer dish that requires very little cooking - we made these caterpillar meter beans, it was so crunchy and refreshing, meter beans have the name because they can grow up to one meter long and are used widely in Chinese

item.title: For all the water spinach lovers- stop looking, this is the BEST and EASIEST way to have water spinach, it only takes 5 minutes, try this now!😋 ingredients water spinach 500g garlic 1 head bird’s eye chili 6 vegan oyster sauce 2 tbsp salt oil recipe 1.ch
item.description: For all the water spinach lovers- stop looking, this is the BEST and EASIEST way to have water spinach, it only takes 5 minutes, try this now!😋 ingredients water spinach 500g garlic 1 head bird’s eye chili 6 vegan oyster sauce 2 tbsp salt oil recipe 1.ch

item.title: Tom Yum Tofu in Airfryer - 10 minutes This is a super quick snack, you only need to marinate the tofu with tom yum sauce and garlic and only 10 mins in the airfryer, so appetizing and full of protein😋 Ingredients firm tofu 400g garlic 3 cloves vegan tom
item.description: Tom Yum Tofu in Airfryer - 10 minutes This is a super quick snack, you only need to marinate the tofu with tom yum sauce and garlic and only 10 mins in the airfryer, so appetizing and full of protein😋 Ingredients firm tofu 400g garlic 3 cloves vegan tom

item.title: Crispy Corn Pancake follow us @littlericenoodles for more vegan Asian recipes😌 this is a popular snack in China, with only 4 ingredients and 5 minutes, you can have this super yummy and crispy snack at any time😋 Ingredients(for 1 pancake) corn canned or f

item.title: Vegan Unadon with homemade Teriyaki Sauce🤓Follow us @littlericenoodle for more vegan Asian recipes Unadon is a traditional Japanese dish, which is rice topped with eel filets glazed with sauce. For the vegan version we used aubergine and a homemade teriya
item.description: Vegan Unadon with homemade Teriyaki Sauce🤓Follow us @littlericenoodle for more vegan Asian recipes Unadon is a traditional Japanese dish, which is rice topped with eel filets glazed with sauce. For the vegan version we used aubergine and a homemade teriya

item.title: Peppermint🌿Fried Tofu Follow us @littlericenoodle for more vegan Asian recipes Peppermint is one of the most used herbs in Yunnan, the southwest of China. In this fried tofu recipe it brings unique texture and flavour to the dish and makes it somehow refr

item.title: Spicy Potato Noodles *GLUTEN FREE ☺️ follow me for more vegan noodles recipes 🌱🌱 Today we are sharing a yummy noodle recipe which is GLUTEN FREE, these potato noodles have a very different consistency and a unique taste compared with the normal wheat nood

item.title: Seaweed/Kelp Salad *Gluten and Sugar Free ☺️ 🌈Ingredients Dried Seaweed/Kelp(海带） 1 sheet Garlic 3 Cloves Soy Sauce 4 tbsp Chinese Dark Vinegar 8 tbsp Red Chili 4 Toasted Sesame 1 tbsp Oil 3 tbsp Sesame Oil 1 tbsp Coriander 1 Stalk 🌈Recipe 1.Soak t
item.description: Seaweed/Kelp Salad *Gluten and Sugar Free ☺️ 🌈Ingredients Dried Seaweed/Kelp(海带） 1 sheet Garlic 3 Cloves Soy Sauce 4 tbsp Chinese Dark Vinegar 8 tbsp Red Chili 4 Toasted Sesame 1 tbsp Oil 3 tbsp Sesame Oil 1 tbsp Coriander 1 Stalk 🌈Recipe 1.Soak t

item.title: Vegan Japanese Curry ♥️ Who loves curry and what is your favorite🙋🏻‍♀️? The most typical Japanese curry is normally made with beef, potatoes and carrots, here we use tofu instead of the beef, it was so easy and yummy😋make sure you cook enough rice when y
item.description: Vegan Japanese Curry ♥️ Who loves curry and what is your favorite🙋🏻‍♀️? The most typical Japanese curry is normally made with beef, potatoes and carrots, here we use tofu instead of the beef, it was so easy and yummy😋make sure you cook enough rice when y

item.description: Vegan Budae Jjigae- Korean Army Stew ☺️☺️ Today we are sharing a recipe of the vegan version of budae jjigae(Korean army stew)—with many yummy ingredients😋it’s simple like a hot pot, you only have to mix a sauce and put all the ingredients in the pot and

item.title: Enoki Mushrooms Wrapped with fresh Tofu Skin Enoki Mushrooms Wrapped with fresh Tofu Skin 💚 These enoki mushrooms are wrapped by fresh tofu skin, pan-fried then cooked in a sauce. This dish is juicy, savory and very easy to make, it can be served as a sna
item.description: Enoki Mushrooms Wrapped with fresh Tofu Skin Enoki Mushrooms Wrapped with fresh Tofu Skin 💚 These enoki mushrooms are wrapped by fresh tofu skin, pan-fried then cooked in a sauce. This dish is juicy, savory and very easy to make, it can be served as a sna

item.title: Lemongrass Tofu 🤗 Today we are sharing a very easy and yummy recipe- lemongrass tofu, it can be made so quickly with simple ingredients, the lemongrass brings a refreshing aroma and the green cap sauce gives a unique savoury taste to the tofu, try this ou

item.title: Sizzling Tofu 鐵板豆腐 Hi guys 👋 we are sharing the recipe of one of our favorite street foods in China which is vegan by itself - sizzling tofu, the tofu is pan-fried on a flat hot plate and seasoned with spices, it’s such a comfort food especially in winter

item.title: Hell’s Ramen🌶️🥵 Follow us @littlericenoodle for more vegan Asian recipes We made Hell’s Ramen today, for anyone who loves spicy, we dare you to try this recipe😌 Originating from Japan’s love for extreme spice challenges, this ramen turns up the heat with
item.description: Hell’s Ramen🌶️🥵 Follow us @littlericenoodle for more vegan Asian recipes We made Hell’s Ramen today, for anyone who loves spicy, we dare you to try this recipe😌 Originating from Japan’s love for extreme spice challenges, this ramen turns up the heat with

item.title: Enough with the boring salads, try this enoki mushroom salad and you will not regret it😋 This dish is very quick and easy to make, it would be a good dinner for one if you are not in the mood or have much time to cook a whole meal 🌈Ingredients Enoki Mush

item.title: Sukiyaki-perfect hot pot for one Follow us @littlericenoodles for more vegan Asian recipes Sukiyaki is a Japanese dish cooked in a pot while being served on the table, it’s similar to the Chinese hot pot typically with a much smaller pot and the broth is

item.title: Peanut Butter Udon🍜 follow us This peanut butter udon is super easy, creamy and yummy- it only requires very simple ingredients and a quick mix of the noodles with the sauce, it can be done in 5 minutes! If you don’t know what to have for dinner and don’

item.title: Pad Kaprao with our new cookbook - Vegan Asian Street Food preorder link in our bio 🥳🥳 Hi guys! We are very happy to announce our new cookbook- Vegan Asian Street Food is coming out in Australia on November 24th and in the end of January in the UK and US.

item.title: Follow us @littlericenoodles for more vegan Asian recipes and Info 1. Green Cap Seasoning Sauce This is one of the most commonly used sauces in Thai cuisine — the “Green Cap Sauce.” An even more well-known brand is “Golden Mountain,” basically the pro-max

item.title: Vegan Chinese New Year Recap🧧Chinese/Lunar New Year is a time of joy, family, and new beginnings. This year we celebrate the Year of the Horse, a symbol of energy, strength, and determination in the Chinese zodiac. #vegan #chinesenewyear #tiktokfood #foo
item.description: Vegan Chinese New Year Recap🧧Chinese/Lunar New Year is a time of joy, family, and new beginnings. This year we celebrate the Year of the Horse, a symbol of energy, strength, and determination in the Chinese zodiac. #vegan #chinesenewyear #tiktokfood #foo

item.title: Tteokbokki-Spicy Korean Rice Cake 😋 tteokbokki is one of the most classic Korean street food as well as home dish made with chewy rice cakes brasing in a sauce made with gochujang(Korean chili paste). it is savoury, spicy, and the perfect comfort food in
item.description: Tteokbokki-Spicy Korean Rice Cake 😋 tteokbokki is one of the most classic Korean street food as well as home dish made with chewy rice cakes brasing in a sauce made with gochujang(Korean chili paste). it is savoury, spicy, and the perfect comfort food in

item.title: Asian Store Guide-Vegan Meat Substitutes Guide Have you ever tried any vegan meat substitute and did you like it? Which one of these would you like to try? And would you like to see us making recipes with these products? Let us know in the comment area😊
item.description: Asian Store Guide-Vegan Meat Substitutes Guide Have you ever tried any vegan meat substitute and did you like it? Which one of these would you like to try? And would you like to see us making recipes with these products? Let us know in the comment area😊

item.title: Vegan Tom Kha 🌱 This vegan tom kha is a recent favourite of our friends, they have demanded me to make it again and again🤣. Try this today, I am sure you willl love it too😋 Tom kha is a creamy, aromatic, sour and slightly spicy Thai soup that is based on
item.description: Vegan Tom Kha 🌱 This vegan tom kha is a recent favourite of our friends, they have demanded me to make it again and again🤣. Try this today, I am sure you willl love it too😋 Tom kha is a creamy, aromatic, sour and slightly spicy Thai soup that is based on
